description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a broad, flat wooden top and two sturdy pedestal bases on either side, each featuring a set of three drawers. The drawer fronts and the desktop have a warm, medium-brown wood finish, while the sides and back of the pedestals are painted a deep blue, giving the desk a modern, two-tone appearance. The drawers are equipped with round metallic knobs, adding a subtle accent to the overall design. The desk is solid and functional, providing ample workspace on top and organized storage within the drawers. The back of the desk is fully enclosed with blue panels, while the front is open for legroom and access to the drawers. This design is practical for office, study, or administrative environments, offering both utility and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a brown wooden top, blue pedestal bases, and six drawers with metallic knobs. The design is functional and visually striking, suitable for office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open leg space and all six drawers with metallic knobs on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid blue panel of one pedestal and the wooden desktop, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the fully enclosed blue panels of both pedestals and the wooden desktop, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other solid blue pedestal side and the wooden desktop.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open leg space and visible drawers is intended to face the user, with the fully enclosed blue panel side as the back.
